hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -q '.env' && echo '{"continue":false,"stopReason":".env file modification blocked"}' || true; }

CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'git\s+commit' || exit 0; branch=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); if [ "$branch" = "main" ] || [ "$branch" = "master" ]; then echo '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"Direct commit on main/master blocked"}'; exit 0; fi; if ! cargo fmt --check >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"cargo fmt --check failed. Run cargo fmt first."}'; exit 0; fi; if ! cargo clippy -- -D warnings >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"cargo clippy -- -D warnings failed. Fix clippy warnings first."}'; exit 0; fi
FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty'); case "$FILE" in *.rs) cargo check --quiet 2>&1 | head -20 ;; esac; true
